items.title: Update vue-tsc to 3.2.7 for improved compatibility in Frontend Web 🚀
items.summary: This update bumps the vue-tsc package from version 2.2.12 to 3.2.7, enhancing compatibility and fixing issues related to non-ASCII characters in prop default values. Additionally, TypeScript has been updated to version 6.0.3, ensuring better performance and stability. These changes will help maintain a robust development environment for the Frontend Web.

items.title: Update PostCSS to Latest Version in Frontend Web 🚀
items.summary: This update bumps PostCSS from version 8.5.8 to 8.5.10, addressing a critical XSS vulnerability and improving source map encoding performance. The changes enhance security and efficiency in CSS processing, ensuring a smoother development experience.

items.title: Update FontAwesome to 3.2.0 in Frontend Web 🎨
items.summary: This PR updates the @fortawesome/vue-fontawesome package from version 3.1.3 to 3.2.0, adding support for custom gradient fills. The change impacts the package-lock and yarn.lock files, ensuring the frontend has the latest features. No breaking changes are introduced in this update.

items.title: Update axios to version 1.15.2 in Frontend Web 🚀
items.summary: This update bumps axios from version 1.15.0 to 1.15.2, enhancing security with prototype-pollution hardening and introducing an opt-in allowedSocketPaths configuration to mitigate SSRF risks. Additionally, it addresses a memory leak issue in keep-alive sockets, ensuring better performance under load. These changes contribute to a more secure and efficient application.
